headings.usage: H1, H2, large numbers, impactful statements

mono.usage: Code snippets, overlines, tech tags, labels, small functional text

editorial.usage: Subtitles, quotes, 'made with love' text to add a luxury touch

layout.spacingScale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-24, py-32 to create breathing room.

gridPatterns.about: Bento 'Control Room' grid mixed with 'Tetris' asymmetry.
gridPatterns.projects: Asymmetrical 12-column grid, spanning 8 cols and 4 cols.
gridPatterns.skills: Floating matrix/tags layout, avoiding standard boring lists.

visualEnhancers.noiseOverlay: Fixed full-screen SVG noise filter (opacity: 0.03, mix-blend-mode: overlay) to give a tactile, architectural feel.
visualEnhancers.customCursor: Custom React cursor following mouse with a 12px dot and a delayed 40px ring. Mix-blend-mode: difference.
visualEnhancers.scrollProgress: Thin fixed top progress bar colored with accent #E05C36.
visualEnhancers.borders: 1px solid border-white/5 everywhere. Elements should feel 'drafted' or architectural.
visualEnhancers.glowEffects: Subtle radial gradients (15% opacity) behind hero text and timeline nodes.

components.buttons: Flat surfaceHighlight background, 1px borderHighlight, uppercase JetBrains Mono, hover: translate-y-[-2px] with glow.
components.cards: surface background, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/5, sharp corners or max rounded-md to maintain architectural brutalism.
components.timeline: Vertical left-aligned 1px border. Nodes are empty squares that fill with accent color on scroll.
components.toast: Sonner toast, dark theme, frosted glass background, solid white text.
components.accordion: Shadcn accordion customized: huge text, no background, 1px bottom border, custom animated '+' to '-' icon.
components.forms: Shadcn forms with flat inputs, no rounded corners, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E05C36], subtle background fill.

motion.heroReveal: Framer Motion staggered text reveal (fade-in-up) with slight rotation.
motion.projectHover: Image scale 1.05, 1px border glow, text unhides/slides up.

Hero.structure: Massive 'Crafting Digital' split into two lines. Animated typed text below it using react-type-animation. Stats in a minimal bento row at bottom.
Hero.alignment: Strictly left-aligned aligned to a visible grid line.

About.structure: Bento Grid. One large cell for bio. Narrow cells for Fun Facts. Bottom full-width cell for Skill progress bars.

LearningJourney.structure: 10-phase vertical timeline. Use JetBrains Mono for the phase titles. Left side: Timeline line. Right side: Content.

Skills.structure: Interactive marques or floating tags using JetBrains Mono, moving smoothly using framer-motion.

Projects.structure: Alternating left/right layout. Large images, minimalistic text underneath. Project Links must use data-testid.

Contact.structure: Split layout. Left: Massive 'Let's Talk' typography. Right: Minimalist form (Shadcn customized).

media.images: Use abstract CSS gradients and CSS-based noise. For project placeholders, use high-contrast text-based placeholders or generative canvas backgrounds since external stock APIs are unavailable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Luxury archetype with the specified colors. Do not use generic tailwind grays; use the custom Midnight Obsidian colors.
Install and use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Install 'framer-motion' for scroll reveals, floating elements, and the custom cursor.
Install 'react-type-animation' for the Hero typing effect.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the borders and backgrounds to match the glassy/architectural look. Strip all rounded-xl or rounded-lg; use rounded-sm or rounded-none.
Implement the noise overlay as a fixed div with pointer-events-none over the entire app.
Use JetBrains Mono for all overlines, small labels, numeric stats, and form placeholders.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
